mapper.sql: id, market_code, session_type, session_name, start_time, end_time, is_auction, sort_order, enabled, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_trading_session (market_code, session_type, session_name, start_time, end_time, is_auction, sort_order, enabled) VALUES (#{marketCode}, #{sessionType}, #{sessionName}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{isAuction}, #{sortOrder}, #{enabled})

INSERT INTO market_trading_session (market_code, session_type, session_name, start_time, end_time, is_auction, sort_order, enabled) VALUES
(#{item.marketCode}, #{item.sessionType}, #{item.sessionName}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.isAuction}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.enabled})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_trading_session WHERE market_code = #{marketCode}
